label: Defensive Eff
description: Defensive efficiency (pts allowed per 100 poss estimate)

label: Expected Wins
description: Expected wins based on game-by-game win probabilities

label: SOS (EWP)
description: Strength of schedule via expected win percentage

label: Schedule-Adj Wins
description: Actual wins minus expected wins (luck-adjusted performance)

label: Opponents' Win %
description: Average win percentage of opponents (excluding games vs this team)

label: Q1 Games
description: Games in Quadrant 1 (best opponents, by location)

label: Luck Z-Score
description: Z-score of (Wins - ExpectedWins): measures over/under-performance vs schedule

label: Close Game Rate
description: Proportion of games that are close

label: Home NetEff
description: Home team NetEff at game time

label: Away NetEff
description: Away team NetEff at game time
